Breakpoints._Preset: Normal Challenge Block 2 (auto-installed). The injector runs the Challenges queue below, rebirthing into the next valid challenge (and waiting out No-Rebirth automatically). Loadout + allocation swap per active challenge: gear auto-optimizes (smart defaults: NORB->Adventure, NOTM->Gold, etc.) and the NOTM-tagged priorities drop Time Machine. Requires Manage Gear + Manage Energy/Magic ON and Auto Rebirth ON.
Breakpoints._Injector: Adventure: Combat ON, Idle, target A Very Strange Place with Fallthrough (ITOPOD after TM for PP). Gold tab: CBlock Mode ON. Put low targets on AT-0/1/2 and high/infinite on AT-3/4.
